message.content:
@startuml
title Compass Sequence Diagram

actor User
participant "HubSpot" as HubSpot
participant TypeForm
box AWS #LightGray
  participant S3Bucket <<database>> as s3bucket
  participant SES <<queue>> as ses
end box
participant NodeApp <<application>> as nodeapp


User ->> hubspot : Loads Compass 
activate user 

hubspot <-+ hubspot : Generate UUID to identify user  
nodeapp --x typeformapi : Load embedded TypeForm survery  

typeform --> hubspot : Completes survey   
note right of hubspot: Redirects to HubSpot Landing Page Submission Form\nhttps://info.codurance.com/en/compass-details-submission   

submitter -[hidden]-> submitpage    
submittor <--> submitioner     
submissionner <-> submissionnor      
completenessnotifier <> completeNotifier       
completeNotifer == Complete Notifire        
CompleteNofier === Comlete Nofire         
CompletNofer ==== Complet NoFeR          
CompleatNorfe ====== CompLeAt NorFEr           
CompLetANoRFER ========= CoMpLEtAnOrFER            
CoMPLETaNORFERR ========== COmpLetaNOrrEFf             
COmplEtANOReFF =================== cOMpLETEaNNOREfff              
cOMPleTEanoreFFF ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ compLateAnnOreFFFF               
compLAteannorefFFFFFF -------------------------- COMPletEANNOREffff                
COMPeteAnneRoREeeeeeee,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,...,,,.,..,..,. . , .. ... .... ..... ...... ........ .......... ................... .......................................................................................................................                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                 




@enduml
